settings.heading: FEATURES
settings.content:
The fragrance refill is made from high-quality PE material, which slowly and evenly releases the aroma into the environment.


Ensures long-lasting and consistent scent intensity – without sudden changes or overly strong fragrance at the start.


Lasts up to 3 weeks, depending on usage frequency and ambient temperature.


High heat resistance – perfect for use in cars during both summer and winter.

settings.heading: SAFETY INFORMATION
settings.content:
PECAUTIONS: keep away from vontact with textiles and other surfaces toprevent staining. If oil gets on other surfaces. wipe it immediately. Do not use on body or clothing. Keep away from pets. The manufacturer shall not beliable for any damage that may occur due to incorrect use of the product. Fragrance notes: Orange blossoms, Lemon, Honeysuckle.

CAUTION: H317 May cause an allergic skin reaction. H319 Causes serious eye irration. H412 Harmful to aquatic life with long lasting effects. Keep out of reach of children. Wash hands thoroughly after handling.

IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rising. If skin irration or rash occurs: Get medical advice/attention. Avoid release to the environment. Dipose of contents/ container to in accordance with local/regional/national/international regulation.

Ingredients:

Linalool, 3,7-Dimethyl-1,6-nonadien-3-ol, linalyl acetate, Formaldehyde cyclododecyl ethyl acetal, 2,4-Dimethyl-3-cyclohexen-1-carboxaldehyde, alpha-methyl-1,3-benzodioxole-5-propionaldehyde, Citral, cis-3-Hexenyl methyl carbonate, D-tert-Butylhydrocinamaldehyde, delta-1-(2,6,6-Trimethyl-3-cyclohexen-1-yl)-2-buten-1-one, 1-(5,5-Dimethyl-1-cyclohexen-1-yl)pent-4-en-1-one.

settings.heading: HOW TO USE
settings.content:
Remove the fragrance capsule from the pouch and insert it into the car air freshener holder designed for air vent installation.

Control the fragrance intensity through your car’s air vents – simply adjust the temperature and airflow to achieve your desired scent level.

settings.text: FREYERI premium car diffuser refill designed for a clean, fresh, and long-lasting scent. This car air freshener diffuser effectively eliminates odors while delivering a consistent fragrance experience. Easy to use and compatible with most car diffuser systems, it keeps your car interior smelling modern, fresh, and inviting every day.

Orange blossom adds a delicate, fresh, and slightly sweet floral brightness that enhances elegance and lightness in a fragrance. As a heart note, it brings a clean, radiant character while softening the composition and adding a refined, uplifting floral touch.

Lemon introduces a sharp, zesty, and highly refreshing citrus burst that instantly energizes the fragrance. As a top note, it enhances freshness, improves clarity, and creates a crisp, clean opening that makes the scent feel vibrant and revitalizing.

Honeysuckle adds a soft, sweet, and nectar-like floral warmth that enriches the fragrance with a romantic and comforting character. It smooths the composition, enhances depth, and creates a gentle, long-lasting, and inviting scent profile.

settings.title: Our fragrances
settings.description: Buy 4 Refill Parfumes and Pay for only 3
